definitions.text: To delete or cross out; to scratch or eliminate.
To have a sharp or sudden physical effect, as of a blow. To hit.
examples: Strike the door sharply with your foot and see if it comes loose. A bullet struck him. The ship struck a reef.
A hammer strikes against the bell of a clock.
Strike the door sharply with your foot and see if it comes loose. A bullet struck him. The ship struck a reef.

definitions.text: A status resulting from a batter swinging and missing a pitch, or not swinging at a pitch when the ball goes in the strike zone, or hitting a foul ball that is not caught.
The act of knocking down all ten pins on the first roll of a frame.
